market_snapshot.as_of: 2026-07-23 EVENING run (~18:07 IST). NIFTY closed 23,869.60 (-126.65/-0.53%), 4th straight down day (open 23904, high 23990, low n/a); Sensex 76,391 (-364). VIX closed 13.14 (intraday high 13.53). Brent surged >$95 (reports up to $98 intraday) on US-Iran escalation (12th night of strikes, Saudi tanker attacked). Auto only green sector; realty -1.8%, energy -1.0%, fin services -0.75%. FII/DII are 22-Jul revised cash figures (-819.2/-418.3cr); 23-Jul provisional not yet published at run time. PCR carried from morning (~1.03, stale). Next weekly expiry 28-Jul (Tue).

key_news: US Thu 23-Jul (after India close, hard risk-off): Nasdaq -2.6% (broke below 25,000 first time since May), S&P 500 -1.4%, Dow -1.1%. Tesla -14% (profit fell despite strong EV deliveries); Alphabet -7% after raising AI capex forecast => Big-Tech capex fears. US signal -1 (S&P < -0.5%)

Oil: Brent surged above $100 intraday on widening Middle-East attacks (US-Iran 12th night of strikes, Saudi tanker hit). Bond sell-off, US 10-yr to ~1.5-year high on inflation fears => risk-off overhang; news signal -1

GIFT Nifty ~23,873, roughly flat vs India prev close 23,869.60 (within +/-0.3% => neutral 0) BUT that quote looks stale/pre-US-selloff; a gap-down open is likely tomorrow. Confirm fresh GIFT + overnight US at the 08:45 morning run
FII 22-Jul -819.20cr (revised; within +/-1000 => neutral 0); July FII net sellers ~-4,837cr. PCR ~1.03 neutral 0. Key levels: support 24,000/23,907/23,801, resistance 24,250/24,350

Draft score -2 (US -1, news -1; GIFT/FII/PCR neutral). VIX 13.14 <=16 => entry threshold 2, naked ATM PUT. But rule 9: a same-direction PUT is already open (trade 3, 23900 PE), so NO new v3 entry tomorrow -- existing put benefits from any gap-down. Next weekly expiry 28-Jul (Tue).

notes: 23-Jul (Thu) NIGHT run. No trades (night). Held trade 3 (23900 PE 28-Jul x1) repriced overnight-flat: spot 23869.6 / VIX 13.14 unchanged since evening close => mark 153.08, unrealized -39.0, total_equity 102,564.69.
